claim: V_quad CC-channel recovers xi_0 = 2/sqrt(3) to 200 digits via Newton-polygon + Birkhoff pipeline (analytical: char eq 1 - beta2*c^2/4 = 0 with beta2=3 yields c = +/- 2/sqrt(3) exactly).
Newton polygon at z=0 of the V_quad ODE has a single slope 1/2 (Gevrey class 2 in z, Gevrey class 1 in u = sqrt(z)), edge (0,0)--(1,2), multiplicity 2.
Indicial exponent rho of V_quad formal solution: rho = -3/2 - beta1/beta2 = -3/2 - 1/3 = -11/6 (exact rational), recovered to 200 digits.

Universal degree-2 PCF Newton-polygon formula: for any (alpha1, alpha0, beta2, beta1, beta0) the ODE for f(z) = sum Q_n z^n has slope 1/2 with action |c| = 2/sqrt(beta2) and indicial exponent rho = -3/2 - beta1/beta2.

Variant-A flip test in corrected formal-series space: 0/5 of {QL01, QL02, QL06, QL15, QL26} match the V_quad P-III(D_6) fingerprint (xi_0, rho, a_1..a_4) at >= 15 digit threshold; minimum agreement across all 4 leading formal coefficients < 1 digit for every non-V_quad family. Variant-A 'BOTH ARTEFACT' verdict from BOREL-CHANNEL-K-SCAN STANDS with much stronger evidence.

Cross-family Borel-radius coincidence: QL15 shares xi_0 = 2/sqrt(3) with V_quad (200 digits agreement) because they share beta2 = 3. Same Borel-singularity radius does NOT imply Painleve match: at the next-order invariants (rho, a_1, ...) they differ at < 1 digit agreement, ruling out a P-III(D_6) reduction for QL15.

Six-family beta2-fingerprint table (xi_0 = 2/sqrt(beta2)): V_quad 2/sqrt(3), QL01 = 2, QL02 = 2, QL06 = sqrt(2), QL15 = 2/sqrt(3), QL26 = 1; rho = -3/2 - beta1/beta2: V_quad -11/6, QL01 -5/2, QL02 -5/2, QL06 -1, QL15 -5/6, QL26 -1; all values 200 digits exact.

UF-1 (CC and BoT distinct in formal-series space D) from CC-PIPELINE-F is CONFIRMED: in the Gevrey-1-in-u corrected space, V_quad's literature xi_0 = 2/sqrt(3) is recovered to 200 digits, whereas in the Gevrey-X-in-1/n trans-series of log|delta_n| (CC-PIPELINE-F's Phase 4) it failed to -0.5 digits.
